name: Roblon A/S
summary: Roblon A/S develops, produces, and sells coated and extruded fiber solutions primarily used in the fiber optic cable and energy sectors. It provides cable fibers, including glass strength members, polyester binder yarns, aramid strength members, ripcords, cable fillers, fiber reinforced plastics, and other products; and cable machinery, such as servers, binders, pay offs, precision winders, caterpillars, and quick adapters for the fiber cable industry. The company also offers offshore solutions comprising orbit straps, multi straps, flex straps, clamp straps, quick straps, ratchet straps, and single and double bolt tension devices; composite reinforcement tapes; composite fiber tapes for anti-bird caging; submarine reinforcement cables, strapping systems, safety nets, and reinforcement of thermoplastic pipes; and high-voltage pulling ropes and coated lines. It operates in Denmark, the United Kingdom, rest of Europe, Asia, Brazil, Italy, Latin America, and the United States. The company was founded in 1957 and is headquartered in Frederikshavn, Denmark.
